message: fix: play artists via top tracks

files.patch:
@@ -7,6 +7,7 @@
 - Search across tracks, albums, artists, playlists, shows, episodes
 - Item info commands for track/album/artist/playlist/show/episode
 - Playback control: play/pause/next/prev/seek/volume/shuffle/repeat/status
+- Artist play uses top tracks (fallback via search)
 - Queue add/show
 - Library management for tracks/albums/artists/playlists
 - Playlist management: create/add/remove/track list

@@ -6,6 +6,7 @@
 
 - Search tracks, albums, artists, playlists, shows, episodes
 - Playback control: play/pause/next/prev/seek/volume/shuffle/repeat
+- Play artists (starts with top tracks)
 - Queue management
 - Library management (save/remove/follow)
 - Playlist management (create/add/remove/list)

@@ -66,6 +66,7 @@ spogo [global flags] <command> [args]
 
 - `spogo play [<id|url>]` (track/album/playlist/show)
   - optional: `--type <track|album|playlist|show|episode>` for raw IDs
+  - artist URIs play top tracks (starts with the first)
 - `spogo pause`
 - `spogo next`
 - `spogo prev`
